title: Kent & Stowe 1L Indoor Watering Can in Blush Pink, Rust-Resistant Galvanised Watering Can with Handle and Long Spout, Classic All Year Round Garden Tools Made from Steel
features: Vintage style: With a Kent & Stowe embellishment, this blush pink garden watering can is perfect as a classically-styled garden décor and for the everyday watering/feeding of plants.
Ideal for indoor use: Perfectly suited for use as an indoor watering can, this watering can makes a stylish addition to any home and is great to give as a gift too.
Rust-resistant: Crafted from galvanised steel, the metal watering can is powder coated to be sturdy yet elegant and is designed to resist rust all year round.
1L capacity: This garden watering can boasts a 1 litre capacity (0.22 gallon) making it ideal for watering houseplants as well as smaller pots and planters.
Scope of delivery: Kent & Stowe 1L Indoor Watering Can, colour: blush pink, material: galvanised steel, product code: 70300640
description: From the manufacturer Kent & Stowe 1L Indoor Metal Watering Can Kent & Stowe Kid's Stainless Steel Digging Spade Kent & Stowe 9L Watering Can Kent & Stowe 4.5L Watering Can Kent & Stowe Capability Trowel Kent & Stowe Anvil Eversharp Secateurs Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.8 out of 5 stars 18 4.4 out of 5 stars 48 3.4 out of 5 stars 309 4.3 out of 5 stars 215 4.8 out of 5 stars 380 3.5 out of 5 stars 12 Price £13.60 £ 13 . 60 £22.99 £ 22 . 99 £34.40 £ 34 . 40 £25.59 £ 25 . 59 £14.95 £ 14 . 95 £26.75 £ 26 . 75 Category Indoor watering can Kid's digging spade Outdoor watering can Outdoor watering can Digging hand tool Cutting hand tool Description This Indoor Metal Watering Can helps provide targeted watering for smaller plants and a touch of style to your home. Designed to be a lighter, smaller version of Kent & Stowe's full-size digging spade, it's ideal for growing gardeners to use. This classic Kent & Stowe 9L Metal Watering Can in galvanised steel is ideal for the everyday watering and feeding of the whole garden with its greater capacity. This classic Kent & Stowe 4.5L Metal Watering Can in deep violet is ideal for the everyday watering and feeding of plants. Built with multi-functionality at its core, the Capability Trowel is a garden essential thanks to the serrated edge for slicing through weeds, pointed tip for stony soils and a hammer handle for hammering in stakes. Anvil secateurs with Eversharp carbon steel blades, ideal for cutting delicate stems and the general pruning of dead wood.
